# blueprint-typespec: Limitations

Custom decorators are kept only when no clean native TypeSpec equivalent exists.

## DB schema decorators (`@ref`, `@unique`)

The DBML-specific decorators `@ref` (foreign key) and `@unique` (unique constraint)
live in `@a10n/typespec-dbml`, not in `@a10n/blueprint-typespec`. They are not
blueprint concerns.

## `statusNote` on `@dependency` — per-status free-text note

The `@dependency` decorator intentionally does not carry a `statusNote` field.
If a dependency has a status-specific note (e.g. "(default embedding model;
configurable)"), it should go in the `why` or `gotchas` arrays instead.
